description.en: Adding the ability to edit pastures after placement.

text.name: ep_openConstructionFirst
text.en: Open the construction menu (build mode), then use Edit pasture from the placeable dialog or stand near the barn.

text.name: ep_editDenied
text.en: Cannot edit this pasture right now.

text.name: ep_editDeniedNotOwner
text.en: You do not own this pasture.

text.name: ep_editDeniedBusy
text.en: Someone is already editing this pasture.

text.name: ep_pastureTooSmall
text.en: Pasture is too small for the animals you currently have. Make the pasture bigger.
